name: gate_params_83_40
description: StylusParams::load reads max_wasm_size at v40+ (programs/params.rs:83). Genesis at v40 — loading params will pull max_wasm_size from packed storage. ArbWasm.maxStackDepth call (selector 0xa996e0c2 setMaxStylusContractFragments triggers param load) but here a simple deposit is enough as the params load happens during normal block production.
